news.headline: Brazil blacklists BYD for slave labour conditions at its biggest plant outside China
news.summary:
Brazil’s labour ministry on Tuesday added Chinese electric vehicle giant BYD to a registry of employers found to have subjected workers to conditions analogous to slavery, limiting access to state financing and increasing reputational risks in its most important market outside China.

news.headline: Trump repeats falsehoods that he predicted 9/11 and demanded Bin Laden's death
news.summary: During a press conference on Monday about the war in Iran, Donald Trump made a series of false claims about Washington’s progress in the conflict, his own past foreign policy, and that his book released in 2000 predicted 9/11.

news.headline: Qatar warns Iran war can now 'spiral out of control'
news.summary: As Donald Trump threatened to wipe out an entire civilisation in Iran ahead of his latest deadline for Tehran to open up the Strait of Hormuz, Qatar's foreign ministry official warned that the world was nearing a point beyond which the war would be out of anyone's control.
